nodes.norm_label: черновик правок `.cursor/rules/stack.mdc` (выполнить после реализации всех задач)

nodes.label: Viewport Zoom Disabled
nodes.rationale: maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=no and touch-action:manipulation prevent pinch/double-tap zoom on field devices

nodes.label: PocketBase
nodes.rationale: Single binary on same VPS as static frontend; server is source of truth

nodes.label: PWA Offline Shell
nodes.rationale: Service Worker caches app shell only; data cache via IndexedDB; iOS needs Add to Home Screen for reliable offline

nodes.label: Offline Sync Queue
nodes.rationale: Write shifts to IndexedDB queue when offline; flush to PocketBase on online/startup; no Background Sync-only path

nodes.label: idb Library
nodes.rationale: Chosen over dexie as thinner/lighter IndexedDB wrapper

nodes.label: syncStatus Indicator
nodes.rationale: Unify independent syncStatus state in AppShell and HomePage into single sync service source

nodes.label: PocketBase Auth
nodes.rationale: authWithPassword; authStore in localStorage by default (remember always on); no public registration — admin creates users

nodes.label: Equal Salary Split
nodes.rationale: History aggregates perPerson() — salary divided equally among shift participants

nodes.label: Nginx SPA + PB Proxy
nodes.rationale: try_files for SPA; proxy /pb/ or pb subdomain to PocketBase on 127.0.0.1:8090; same-origin avoids CORS

nodes.label: VPS Git Deploy
nodes.rationale: CI builds dist and rsyncs to server preferred over build-on-server (fewer prod deps)

nodes.label: DesktopHomePage
nodes.rationale: PC layout lives inside HomePage.tsx; HomePcPage.tsx is dead code to delete

nodes.label: #app-portal
nodes.rationale: Unified modal/sheet portal for mobile and desktop replacing #phone-portal

nodes.label: iOS Add to Home Screen Onboarding
nodes.norm_label: ios add to home screen onboarding

nodes.label: Preserve Figma Visual
nodes.rationale: Do not rewrite inline styles, keyframes, or unused shadcn kit; only wire real logic around existing UI

nodes.label: PB Path vs Subdomain Open Question
nodes.norm_label: pb path vs subdomain open question

nodes.label: icon-192.png PWA app icon
nodes.description: 192×192 px Progressive Web App icon: flat geometric nested-square brand mark for home screen / app switcher.

nodes.label: Nested square brand mark
nodes.description: Symmetrical flat mark: black outer square, centered orange square, smaller white square inset; no gradients, shadows, or rounded corners.

nodes.label: Black outer frame
nodes.description: Solid black square background framing the orange and white nested squares.

nodes.label: Orange accent square
nodes.description: Large saturated warm orange square (~#FF7F00 / brand orange) centered on the black field.

nodes.label: White center square
nodes.description: Smaller white square centered in the orange field, creating a button-like hole in the mark.

nodes.label: calc app visual identity
nodes.description: Brand identity signal for the calc PWA: orange-on-black nested squares used as installable app icon.

nodes.label: icon-512.png
nodes.description: 512×512 PWA/app icon: three nested centered squares (black outer, orange middle, white inner), sharp corners, no gradients or shadows.

nodes.label: Nested-square brand mark
nodes.description: Minimal geometric brand mark: square-within-square composition, symmetrical and centered.

nodes.label: Black outer field
nodes.description: Solid black outermost square serving as icon background/border.

nodes.label: Orange brand square
nodes.description: Large solid high-saturation orange middle square; primary brand accent (approx #FF7F00, aligns with app orange #FF6B00).

nodes.label: White inner square
nodes.description: Smaller solid white (#FFFFFF) center square nested inside the orange field.

nodes.label: PWA install / home-screen icon
nodes.description: High-resolution app icon for Web App Manifest / installable PWA under public/icons for the calc road-marking payroll app.

nodes.label: apple-touch-icon.png iOS home screen icon
nodes.description: Apple touch / iOS home-screen icon for the calc PWA: flat geometric nested-square brand mark (orange field with centered white square).

nodes.label: Nested square brand mark
nodes.description: Minimalist flat mark: solid orange outer square with a smaller solid white square centered inside; no gradients, textures, shadows, or rounded corners.

nodes.label: Orange background square
nodes.description: Uniform vibrant orange square filling the entire icon canvas as the background field.

nodes.label: White center square
nodes.description: Smaller white square (~25–30% of icon width/height) centered in the orange field, forming a button-like hole in the mark.

nodes.label: iOS Add to Home Screen icon
nodes.description: Asset role: apple-touch-icon used when installing the PWA on iPhone/iPad home screen (Safari / WebKit).
nodes.norm_label: ios add to home screen icon

nodes.label: calc app visual identity
nodes.description: Brand identity signal for the calc PWA on iOS: orange-and-white nested squares as the home-screen app icon.

nodes.label: icon-192-maskable.png maskable PWA icon
nodes.description: 192×192 px maskable Progressive Web App icon: full-bleed orange field with a centered white square, sized for OS adaptive masks.

nodes.label: Orange-white nested square mark
nodes.description: Minimal flat mark: solid orange square background with a smaller solid white square centered; no black frame, gradients, or rounded corners.

nodes.label: Orange full-bleed background
nodes.description: Uniform vibrant orange fill covering the entire icon canvas (maskable bleed / padding area).

nodes.label: White center square
nodes.description: Small solid white square centered on the orange field; primary foreground glyph of the mark.

nodes.label: Maskable safe zone layout
nodes.description: White square sits well inside the central ~80% safe zone so circle/rounded-square OS masks keep the mark visible; orange extends to edges as bleed.

nodes.label: calc app visual identity
nodes.description: Maskable variant of the calc PWA brand: orange accent with inset white square for adaptive home-screen icons.

nodes.label: icon-512-maskable.png maskable PWA icon
nodes.description: 512×512 px maskable Progressive Web App icon: solid orange canvas with a small centered white square kept in the safe zone for OS masking (circle, squircle, rounded rect).

nodes.label: Centered white-on-orange mark
nodes.description: Minimal flat mark: single solid white square centered on a full-bleed solid orange field; no gradients, shadows, borders, or outer black frame.

nodes.label: Orange full-bleed background
nodes.description: Uniform solid bright orange covering the entire 512×512 canvas (maskable outer padding / bleed).

nodes.label: White center square
nodes.description: Small solid white square centered in the frame; side length roughly ~1/4 of the icon, critical content for masked display.

nodes.label: Maskable safe zone layout
nodes.description: White square concentrated at center so OS adaptive masks crop only the orange bleed and leave the mark fully visible.

nodes.label: calc app visual identity
nodes.description: Brand signal for the calc PWA installable icon: orange field + white square (maskable variant without black outer frame).
